  • Artists

Essential Gothic Country Songs

The dark country canon — all 1481 songs from Dark Country Boy's gothic country catalog, plus the essential gothic country classics.

Gothic country music's power lies in its songs. Murder ballads, dark love songs, spiritual wrestlings, and tales of outlaws and sinners — these are the tracks that define the genre. Below you'll find the complete Dark Country Boy catalog, 1481 songs of gothic country in its most prolific modern form.
